message:
feat(parser): complete SQL lexer and parser (bd-2tu6)

Hand-written recursive descent parser with Pratt precedence-climbing
for expressions. Covers all SQLite statement types: SELECT (with CTEs,
compound ops, window functions), INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE, CREATE/DROP/ALTER,
transactions, PRAGMA, VACUUM, REINDEX, ANALYZE, and EXPLAIN. Expression
parser handles correct SQLite operator precedence including LIKE/GLOB
with ESCAPE, BETWEEN, IN, IS [NOT], CAST, CASE, RAISE, and JSON arrows.
73 tests pass across lexer, parser, and expression modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
